text: Calls grow over hospital care for jailed Iranian Nobel laureate Narges Mohammadi - BBC
fullText: On Friday her family said the 54-year-old had been taken from prison to a local hospital after a sharp deterioration in her health.

text: Motorola Beats Apple And Samsung: The Razr Ultra 2026 Debuts Innovative Battery Tech - Forbes

text: More Than Three Million People Have Lost Federal Food Aid - WSJ

text: Norris beats Piastri and Leclerc to victory in Miami Sprint - Formula 1
fullText: Lando Norris claimed victory during Saturday’s Sprint race at the Miami Grand Prix, crossing the line ahead of McLaren team mate Oscar Piastri and Ferrari’s Charles Leclerc, after another tricky start for Mercedes man Kimi Antonelli.

text: Germany says US troop withdrawal 'foreseeable' as Nato seeks clarification - BBC
fullText: German Defence Minister Boris Pistorius said the US decision to withdraw 5,000 troops was to be expected.

text: Princess Charlotte Plays Cricket and Cuddles Family Dogs in Rare New Birthday Video Shared by Kate Middleton and Prince William - Yahoo News Canada
fullText: Kate Middleton and Prince William shared a video of their daughter, Princess Charlotte, to celebrate her 11th birthday on May 2. In it, Charlotte can be seen playing on a beach and petting the family's two cocker spaniels.

text: Box Office: ‘The Devil Wears Prada 2’ Struts to $32.5 Million on Opening Day - Variety
fullText: 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' earned $32.5 million on opening day and looks to earn about $80 million through the weekend.

text: Spirit Shuts Operations After White House Bailout Collapses - Bloomberg.com
fullText: Spirit Aviation Holdings Inc. is winding down operations after the troubled US discount carrier buckled under the weight of surging fuel prices and a government bailout dangled by President Donald Trump fell through.

text: Warren Buffett asked Tim Cook to take a bow in a surprise speech at Berkshire meeting - Business Insider
fullText: Warren Buffett unexpectedly thanked Tim Cook for making his Apple investment such a huge success during Berkshire's shareholder meeting on Saturday.

text: Prates stops Della Maddalena at UFC Fight Night Perth - ESPN
fullText: Carlos Prates has put himself right in contention for a shot at the UFC welterweight title following a devastating striking performance against former champion Jack Della Maddalena.

text: Vehicles crashes into Multnomah Athletic Club, evidence of 'explosive device' found inside - KGW
fullText: One person was found dead after a vehicle crashed into the Multnomah Athletic Club early Saturday. Police are investigating evidence of a possible explosive device.

text: Meet the Kentucky Derby horses running in the 2026 race - CBS News

text: UFC Perth results: Tai Tuivasa suffers 7th straight loss after ugly fight against Louie Sutherland - MMA Fighting
fullText: Louie Sutherland got his first UFC win while Tai Tuivasa’s losing streak continued on Saturday.

text: Scientists sound alarm as dangerous amoebas spread globally - ScienceDaily

text: Trump is running out of options to contain gas price backlash - The Washington Post
fullText: The rising cost of oil is becoming a major political concern for the White House, as the stalemate between President Donald Trump and Iran drags on.

text: Trump’s Cuban American base is no longer guaranteeing him loyalty - Politico
